title: Latest Order Per Customer
description: Retrieve the most recent order for each customer along with the order amount. Assume each customer has at most one order on a given date.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id, amount FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY date DESC) rn FROM orders) WHERE rn = 1;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

latest_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(to_date(col("date")).desc())

result = (
    orders.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(latest_window))
    .filter(col("rn") == 1)
    .select("customer_id", "amount")
)
